task_completion.description: Verify that ground stations for Geneva and Beijing have been added with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Ground Stations' settings window in GPredict (Edit -> Preferences -> Ground Stations) or a module configuration screen showing 'Geneva' (Lat: 46.2044, Lon: 6.1432, Alt: 375) and 'Beijing' (Lat: 39.9042, Lon: 116.4074, Alt: 43) in the list of available or selected ground stations.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'NASA_Assets' module with the correct satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module tab or window named 'NASA_Assets'. The list of tracked satellites in this module must include ISS (ZARYA), ISS (NAUKA), and SUOMI NPP.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'CNSA_Assets' module with the correct satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module tab or window named 'CNSA_Assets'. The list of tracked satellites in this module must include CSS (TIANHE), CSS (WENTIAN), CSS (MENGTIAN), FENGYUN 3A, and FENGYUN 3B.

task_completion.description: Verify that the default 'Amateur' module has been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main GPredict interface and open module tabs. There should be no tab or window named 'Amateur'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the system is configured to display UTC time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the clock displayed in the GPredict modules (usually at the top or in the status bar); it should indicate 'UTC'. Alternatively, look for the GPredict Preferences window (General -> Number formats) with the 'Show time in UTC instead of local time' option checked.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict application windows, menus, and dialogs being interacted with, rather than just a terminal window editing configuration files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual GPredict software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be the authentic GPredict application, not a mock-up, text editor, or a script output.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use unauthorized scripts to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no visible terminal windows running bash or python scripts that directly inject the configuration into GPredict's hidden config folders.

privileged_info_for_vlm: NASA_Assets must contain NORAD IDs: 25544 (ISS ZARYA), 49044 (ISS NAUKA), 37849 (SUOMI NPP). CNSA_Assets must contain NORAD IDs: 48274 (CSS TIANHE), 53239 (CSS WENTIAN), 54216 (CSS MENGTIAN), 32958 (FENGYUN 3A), 37214 (FENGYUN 3B). Ground station Geneva: 46.2044 N, 6.1432 E, 375m. Ground station Beijing: 39.9042 N, 116.4074 E, 43m. Time display must be set to UTC.
